papers_mined.title: Science and the Stradivarius Physics World
papers_mined.note: Stradivarius: low internal damping wood + carefully graduated plate thickness + selective varnish damping; resonances strongly peaked; small thickness changes = large frequency shift.

papers_mined.title: Stradivarius Secret Wood Asian Scientist
papers_mined.note: Wood mineral preservative (copper/iron/chromium salts + borax/zinc/alum/lime) alters acoustical properties; well-seasoned wood.

papers_mined.title: Secrets of Stradivari Nagyvary Scientific American
papers_mined.note: Wood-chemistry treatment + ground coat calcium-rich + final-varnish oil/resin = selective damping agent reducing weak frequencies preserving fundamental.

papers_mined.note: Varnish layered + ground+main coat + selective frequency damping + harmonic preservation.
